case_title: OPURTUN, INC. VS. PEDRO HENRIQUE MANICOBA DE ARAUJO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPURTUN, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT REMAILED TO DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPURTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE ARAUJO, PEDRO HENRIQUE MANICOBA $1,606.85 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,721.85, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LOAN DELINQUENCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -- FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00- SERVED FEB-08-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE ARAUJO, PEDRO HENRIQUE MANICOBA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPURTUN, INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 04/03/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNABLE TO FORWARD/FOR REVIEW."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,606.85 FILED BY OPURTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE ARAUJO, PEDRO HENRIQUE MANICOBA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4-3-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
